query:
SELECT
                id          AS "id!: Uuid",
                user_id     AS "user_id!: Uuid",
                token_hash  AS "token_hash!",
                expires_at  AS "expires_at!",
                used_at     AS "used_at?"
            FROM password_reset_tokens
            WHERE token_hash = $1
              AND used_at IS NULL
              AND expires_at > NOW()
